text.title: nginx Reverse Proxy: Real-World Examples
text.summary: Production nginx configurations from the NERO platform: multi-service site with API prefix stripping, WebSocket, and X-Accel-Redirect; MeetingTax multi-subdomain setup; adding a new domain in three commands.

section.title: NERO Platform (nero.faion.net)
section.p: Architecture: Cloudflare → nginx → FastAPI on 8100 (API + WebSocket) + React SPA on 8101. API routes stripped of /api prefix. Attachments served internally via X-Accel-Redirect.

section.title: Multi-Subdomain Setup (MeetingTax)
section.p: Three server blocks: static landing at meetingtax.io, full-stack app at app.meetingtax.io, API direct at api.meetingtax.io.

see-also.link: Audit all active sites and headers
